data.title: 24 Seven acquires Futureman and MTP, marking its 10th and 11th acquisitions to boost its creative agency and talent solutions.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, 24 Seven, a major privately owned marketing, creative, and digital talent solutions company, revealed the completion of its 10th and 11th acquisitions. These strategic acquisitions are poised to significantly enhance the company's creative agency and talent solutions capabilities. This move consolidates 24 Seven's position as one of the nation's leading firms in this sector.

data.title: West-MEC in Peoria, Arizona is helping power the workforce for growth in the West Valley, partnering with major employers like Amkor, Nestlé, and Amazon in metro Phoenix.
data.description: In Peoria, Arizona, on October 9, 2025, it was highlighted that a competent workforce plays a crucial role in the economic growth of rapidly developing areas like the West Valley in Arizona. Companies like Amkor, Nestlé, and Amazon are among the key employers contributing to the expansion of operations in the metro Phoenix area. This emphasizes the importance of skilled labor in supporting the economy.

data.title: New report by The Beryl Institute on AI in healthcare emphasizes balance between technology and human touch.
data.description: A recently published report by The Beryl Institute in Nashville, Tennessee, on October 9, 2025, addresses the potential and hurdles in integrating AI into healthcare while preserving the personal aspect. The paper, "Defining and Advancing the Use of AI in Healthcare Experience," explores strategies to leverage AI effectively. This research provides insights into balancing technological advancements with maintaining a human-centric approach.

data.title: Air Products (NYSE: APD) to report fiscal 2025 Q4 earnings on Nov 6, 2025, in a teleconference at 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled by Air Products (NYSE:APD) on November 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, to review the company's financial standings for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025. The call will be open for public and media listening, with no participation option.

data.title: Calgary's Questworld unveils a Not-So-Spooky Haunted House, Ancient Egypt–themed for families. Media Night on Oct 15.
data.description: A new attraction, the Not-So-Spooky Haunted House, with an Ancient Egypt theme, has been launched by Questworld in Calgary, Alberta. This family-friendly adventure is set to debut on Oct 15 with a special Media Night.

data.title: Slotland, a pioneer in online casino industry, celebrates 27th anniversary with 3 exclusive slots and Free Spins feature.
data.description: Celebrating its 27th year in the online casino industry, Slotland has introduced three new exclusive slots along with the debut of the much-awaited Free Spins bonus feature. The company, a trailblazer in online casinos, commemorates this milestone in Panama City on October 9, 2025. This move showcases its commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Britive named "Privileged Access Management Solution of the Year" in 2025 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards.
data.description: In Glendale, California on October 9, 2025, Britive, a company specializing in cloud-native privileged access security with a focus on Zero Standing Privileges (ZSP) was awarded the title of "Privileged Access Management Solution of the Year" by the 2025 CyberSecurity awards. This recognition solidifies Britive's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Crowe LLP launches Crowe Studio to modernize, using AI and global model. Aims to help clients compete effectively.
data.description: Crowe LLP unveiled a new unit on October 9, 2025, based in Chicago, designed to assist the company and its clients in rapidly modernizing and enhancing competitiveness in today's evolving economic landscape. This initiative, empowered by AI technology and boasting a global delivery framework, aims to streamline processes and drive innovation. This move underscores Crowe's commitment to staying ahead of the curve and fostering growth, ultimately benefitting from a more efficient and adaptable business approach.

data.title: TCL launches "The Ultimate Season to Score" giveaway with big screen savings, weekly prizes, and NFL experiences.
data.description: Irvine, California - OCTOBER 9, 2025 - TCL®, a top consumer electronics brand and the Official TV Partner of the NFL, is offering fans exciting opportunities to enhance their game-watching experience. With significant discounts on big screens, weekly prize giveaways, and exclusive NFL experiences up for grabs, viewers can expect to be more engaged with the game like never before.

data.title: Citigroup invests in BVNK for stablecoin, anticipating a $1.9 trillion market by 2030. Deal through Citi Ventures, BVNK handles $20 billion in transactions annually. US banks can issue stablecoins under new regulation.
data.description: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C) has recently entered the competition for stablecoins on Wall Street by investing in U.K.-based BVNK, as the banking sector gears up for a potential $1.9 trillion market focusing on tokenized dollars. The investment was facilitated by Citi Ventures, with BVNK managing a substantial volume of over $20 billion in annual transactions for notable clients like Worldpay, Flywire, and dLocal. Arvind Purushotham, head of Citi Ventures, highlighted the growing popularity of stablecoins for on-chain settlements and asset payments. The specific financial details of the deal were not disclosed by the bank. In response to the new GENIUS Act, effective as of July, which allows U.S. banks to issue and oversee payment stablecoins under Treasury regulation, Citi and other financial institutions are rapidly entering the regulated stablecoin market. This move by Citi represents a significant shift in attitude from being skeptical about Bitcoin to embracing tokenized dollars, reflecting the evolving landscape of digital currencies and blockchain technologies in the financial industry.

data.title: MNTN appoints Fraser Woollard as Head of Business Development and Data Partnerships to accelerate product roadmap. #MNTN #FraserWoollard
data.description: A technology platform focused on Connected TV, MNTN (NYSE: MNTN), based in New York, has named Fraser Woollard as the new Head of Business Development and Data Partnerships. Woollard's responsibilities include spearheading global business development efforts to broaden MNTN's network of data and technology partnerships. These partnerships are crucial for supporting the platform's AI-powered performance marketing system and its exclusive Performance Gra.

data.title: Patero Inc. and Calibr8 Systems form alliance to promote post-quantum cryptography adoption in Australia and the Philippines.
data.description: In an announcement made today, Patero Inc. and Calibr8 Systems have disclosed a strategic partnership to aid in the transition of industrial data infrastructures in the ASEAN countries from pre- to post-quantum cryptography. Patero Inc., known for its expertise in post-quantum cryptography, has joined forces with Calibr8 Systems, a prominent provider of IT/OT convergence and industrial data infrastructure solutions. This partnership aims to facilitate the migration of systems within the Australia-New Zealand Free Trade Area, focusing on enhancing cybersecurity measures. Through this alliance, the companies plan to offer cryptographic discovery and inventor services to support this transition effectively.

data.title: Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. will report Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 4, 2025; press release before market open.
data.description: CHANHASSEN, Minnesota - Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LTH) has scheduled the release of its third quarter 2025 financial results for Tuesday, November 4, 2025, before the market opens. The Company also plans to hold a conference to discuss these results.
